stemHtml: After departure, you are flying towards a mountain range and you experience a severe gust with a sudden loss of airspeed and altitude. What should you do?

options.b: you don't make a report, only severe turbulence has to be reported.
options.c: you don't make a report, pilots are not obliged to report on weather conditions.
options.d: if only voice communication is available no report should be made.
